blocks.text:
Financial management studies how firms allocate
resources and evaluate risk.
The objective of firm value is linked to cash flows, timing,
and uncertainty.
Managers compare investment alternatives by estimating
incremental value creation.
Discount rates reflect opportunity cost, inflation, and
compensation for risk.
A useful reading strategy is to track the claim, the
evidence, and the implication.
When a page is text-rich, a text-first pass should still
generate grounded anchors.
Each paragraph can expose a distinct question,
explanation, and bbox candidate.
This smoke document is intentionally simple so routing and
fallback are easy to inspect.
Short caption and almost no body text.
